text:
CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = Did not screen positive for education need 
1 = Screened positive for education need 
Missing 

COMMENT: The variables considered for this indicator are SR_SPLMTL_EDCTN_1_SW and 
SR_SPLMTL_EDCTN_2_SW. This field is “1” if either of the education questions was positive for the 
need (value of 1 = Yes). 

Variables that start with “SR” include information for each screening. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
